feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Check change history for the customer master
entry.content: How to check change history for customer master in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition ?

entry.title: Move the old home page to spaces and pages home page in S/4 public cloud
entry.content:
As per SAP document, I should have "import apps now" icon when spaces and pages are switched on in my system. But, there is none. Is there up-to-date blog available on the spaces and pages? since I can see many changes in my test system with enabled spaces and pages, not matching with the blogs released earlier.

Reference: https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/getting-familiar-with-spaces-and-pages-in-sap-s-4hana-cloud-public-edition/ba-p/13575120

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Download path of Payment Media in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

 

Does anyone have idea how to download payment media in secured file server from S/4HANA Public Cloud?

 

Via "Manage Payment  Media" app (F1868), payment media can be downloaded manually, and download file path is determined by web browser settings, not by S/4HANA. A customer is pointing our the risks of data falsification as end-users could edit the downloaded payment media before uploading it to bank communication systems.

On-Premise and PCE can configure the download file path, but I didn't find such function in Public Cloud.

 

If you have any idea or experience to tackle this risk, please share it.

 

Best regards,

Tomoyoshi

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP Payment Engine

entry.title: Migration Public Cloud for Low Value assets
entry.content:
How could i correctly migrate Low-Value-Assets. I prepared the Data and uploaded the XML.

Have you any informations about the right way to prepare the migration for low value assets?

 

BR Florian

entry.title: Delivery setup indicator for previous year PURCHASE ORDERS
entry.content:
Hello Experts ,

 

I would like to know whether it is possible to SET DELIVERY COMPLITED INDICATOR In Purchase Orders which are previously years pending even though the over deliv tolerence is maintained ...?

 

How to proceed to trigger this indicator for pending PO.....?

entry.title: Remove the ability to delete a purchasing order in Fiori App Manage Material Coverage
entry.content:
in S/4 public cloud - In the tile “Monitor Material Coverage – individual/net segment” if I click on “Stock availability” then “Check Material Coverage” I switch to another tile called “Manage Material Coverage”.

Here, it’s possible to delete a purchasing order. We would like to remove this possibility.

in S/4 PUBLIC Cloud the catalog which allow to access to the tule “Monitor material coverage – Net/Individual” and “Manage Material Coverage” is :

  • SAP_SCM_BC_MRPCOCKPIT_MC

Do you think it's possible to remove the ability to delete a purchasing order with restriction while retaining access to the tile and all other features?

SAP Fiori Cloud

entry.title: Output Parameter Determination for Production Order Output
entry.content:
Hi,

Upon accessing the manufacturing (production) order output thru Output Parameter Determination (OPD), it has Manufacturting_OP_Activity as one of the output type. However, when I tried to add getting an error message 'Selected output type MANUFACTURING_OP_ACTIVITY is not valid for this application'. 

Other than manufacturing order application, I could not find where Manufacturting_OP_Activity can be used.

Please provide how it can be utilized as an output for S/4 Public Cloud as customer has a requirement to print WIP label for a production order.

Thanks,

Falgun Shah

entry.title: Assign Nota Fiscal Type to Sales Document Types - Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi friends,

We are implementing Brazil (NF-e / NFS-e) on S/4HANA Public Cloud and are facing some difficulties about the following configurations:

  • Assign Nota Fiscal Type to Sales Document Types (S_ALR_87007608)
  • NF relevant Item Categories (S_ALR_87007627)
  • NF Relevance (Billing Types) (S_ALR_87007624)

We know that these t-codes above do not work in Public Cloud solution and included them just for reference. ‌‌😉

We can't create new sales documents as well.

We searched the SSCUIs documentation but did not find any related IDs to these items.

How to define the types of NFe related to the respective sales documents, Billing, Item categories in Public Cloud and link them? ‌‌🤔

Should we implement only through Badis? ‌‌🤔

Thanks. 🙂

Fabio Spulveda

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud Access using IAS as Proxy but no user in the identity store
entry.content:
We have a customer requirement to use Okta as the Corporate Identity Provider for all cloud applications including SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud with IAS as a Proxy. The customer does not want users to be created in the Cloud Identity Store and managed through the Corporate Identity Store. We have tested this solution and it appears to work. However, we are not sure if this will work for all the SAP cloud applications such as S/4HANA Public Cloud, Identity and Access Governance etc.

Does anyone have experience implementing such a use case? 

Regards,

Subbu Iyer

entry.title: Unable to manage LOVC dependencies in S4 HANA public cloud:
entry.content:
Hello all,

I have a requirement to add an object dependency to BOM items. As far as my knowledge goes, we cannot use AVC for that. We need to use LOVC here with processing mode as Classic.

When I try to create a dependency for a material using PMEVC, by default it is created as AVC and it does not let me switch to Classic:

 

Now, I could not find an equivalent of transaction CU01 in S4 Public Cloud where I can create a new object dependency with processing mode as Classic.

The only work around I found was to use the environment section on the left side panel of PMEVC where I can create a Classic dependency:

 

 

 

 

Now I can save it, but I cannot access it after that through PMEVC as system does not allow me to assign this to any configuration profile:

 

The only way I can access this is by using the app “Variant Configuration Overview”:

 

 

But the challenge here is, even if I try to modify this, I get the error message that I don’t have the access to CU02 which is not a public cloud application:

 

So, my question is, am I using the right approach? If yes, how can I resolve this issue of CU02 access?

If my approach is not correct, how do we work with classic object dependency (LOVC as we know it) in S4 Public Cloud?

Thank you

Snigdhodeep

entry.title: Supplier Payment Analysis (Open Payments)
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We are trying to execute "Supplier Payment Analysis(Open Payments)" app in the system. We have got relevant data in the system still app is not generating any data. Kindly check. Screen shot attached.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: International Trade : PRODCOM in S4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi.

 

Where do I find the equivalent of the PRODCOM field in S4HANA Public Cloud.

Have activated the "International Trade" extra and can see all the apps but still can't find it or equivalent.

Thanks

Derrick

entry.title: How to consume SOAP read API "Manufacturing order - Send V2" in SAP? CO_PPINT_MFGORD_EXE_REQ_OUT_V2
entry.content:
Hello, 

I am working on a SAP S/4 HANA Cloud public edition implementation project (version 2402)

Anyone can help me test and consume this API "Manufacturing order - Send V2" CO_PPINT_MFGORD_EXE_REQ_OUT_V2, from POSTMAN?

https://api.sap.com/api/CO_PPINT_MFGORD_EXE_REQ_OUT_V2/overview

As per my understanding, this is an outbound API that allows to read production order data upon release, but we are not able to execute it yet. 

The request in Postman should be something like: https://host:port/ManufacturingOrderExecuteRequest_Out_V2? or just https://host:port/ as mentioned in API reference website?

In both cases, what should be added in the request body please to be able to retrieve data for one given Production Order? 

We tried first using the OData "Production Order V2" API https://api.sap.com/api/API_PRODUCTION_ORDER_2_SRV/overview, but it was not sufficient for our requirement (for instance, this API does not retrieve the inspection lot information for a production order)

entry.title: Can we add more decimal places for invoices and quantities in SAP Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi all, 

My questions here is twofold:

1) Is it possibles to have decimal places for quantities where we have up to 5 digits after comma?

2) Is it possible to have material prices with 6 digits after the comma? Also showing up like this on invoices etc.

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud TDD Scope Item Activation 6W3
entry.content:
Hello Experts,
we are currently trying to activate the scope item 6W3 in our TDD system. Our Problem is that we cant find it during scoping in the CBC. After doing some research we found a spread sheet from SAP, which list the following scope items under the "Required Scope Items and Business Conditions" for 6W3. 
"6W1; 6W2; BD9; BME; 5D2; 5HP"
Does this mean we have to activate these scope items in our system before we can add 6w3 ?
We greatly appreciate any help.

Kind regards
Lukas

entry.title: Display XML data for output forms in public cloud for forms displayed using Create Correspondence
entry.content:
Hi, 

We have code "#&&DOWNLOAD_FORM_DATA_XML&&#" that we can use to display the xml data for forms that are displayed using output configuration but there are few forms that are displayed via std. apps or create correspondence like FI forms, COA forms and so on

Do we have any way that we can check the xml data for these forms as well?

entry.title: Copy Inspection Results - Data selection procedure 300 is not accepted
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

I have a requirement to copy inspection results from one lot to another in sap s/4 hana public edition, where in "selection procedure" - it is restricted to 100 and 200 only i am unable to set it to 300.

How to make selection procedure set to 300?

Thanks,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: How to call Asynchronous SOAP Web service from ABAP class in S4 HANA public cloud
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have a business requirement to create Main assets in S4 HANA public cloud system(2402), from a custom RAP implementation class.

we have created  the required Communication arrangements in S4 public cloud ( Communication user/system/arrangements) for communication scenario SAP_COM_0563.Outbound service also active in the comm arrangement.

We have tested this SOAP service using SOAP UI tool and its working fine and Assets documents are also getting created in the system.

But We are trying to use the same SOAP API from custom class from eclipse after we creating the service consumption model. and we are getting an error stating "Logical Port does not belong to consumer proxy".

Followed the steps mentioned in this tutorial: https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-environment-soap-web-services..html

SOAP API - used : https://api.sap.com/api/FIXEDASSETCREATEMAIN/overview

Could some one please suggest us how to resolve this, or please suggest the correct approach to be followed to consume the SOAP Web service from custom ABAP class.

entry.title: How to change Material and Serial Number in Equipment master
entry.content:
Once equipment is saved Material and Serial number fields are disabling and not allowing to change the material and serial number.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Manage WorkForce API Access in S/4 HANA Public Edition
entry.content:
Greetings,

I'm currently developing a mobile application using APPGyver and need to integrate specific Workforce/Employee data.

While I've encountered a forum post - [Click Here] - that mentions a dedicated CDS View for employee information, it lacks certain data fields I require. Specifically, I'm searching for:

• Field 1: Manager of the Employee

• Field 2: Cost Center of the Employee

Any guidance or direction to access these fields would be greatly appreciated.

 

Regards

Rahul Jain
